name: Grow RiotML imported fixture corpus with minimal stage0 support

description: Baseline with existing imported syn fixture count

asi.hypothesis: Measure current passing imported fixture corpus before adding translated fixtures.

description: Imported syn 0017 string literal fixture using existing local string let and println support

asi.hypothesis: A simple old syn string binding translates directly to a RiotML main with a local string let and deterministic println, increasing corpus without compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised existing local string let, path expression, and println support.

description: Imported syn 0016 empty string fixture with deterministic blank-line stdout

asi.hypothesis: An empty string binding is supported by existing stage0 string handling and adds corpus coverage for zero-length literals.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered existing empty string literal through local let and println.

description: Imported syn 0029 parenthesized string fixture and added narrow parenthesized expression parsing

asi.hypothesis: Adding parser-only support for parenthesized expressions is the smallest feature needed for the old parenthesized string fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parenthesized expressions in stage0 parser, preserving existing AST/checker/IR by returning the inner expression.

description: Imported syn 0003 bool let fixture with narrow bool literal println support

asi.hypothesis: A small constant-value path through parser and checker can support boolean literals and println without adding general boolean operations.
asi.feature_added: Boolean literals in parser/checker; println of constant bool values lowers to runtime string output true/false.

description: Imported syn 0019 false literal fixture using existing bool println path

asi.hypothesis: The newly added bool constant support should handle false literals directly and grow coverage with no additional compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered false branch of boolean literal printing.

description: Imported syn 0030 parenthesized bool fixture using existing paren and bool support

asi.hypothesis: The combination of parenthesized expression parsing and bool constant support should cover parenthesized bool fixtures without further compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised parenthesized boolean literal printing.

description: Imported syn 0001 integer binding fixture with narrow decimal int println support

asi.hypothesis: A decimal integer constant can reuse the constant println lowering path by rendering the checked constant to a string before runtime emission.
asi.feature_added: Positive decimal integer literals in parser/checker; println of constant integers emits their decimal string representation.

description: Imported syn 0004 multiple let bindings fixture using existing constant binding support

asi.hypothesis: Multiple local lets are already accepted by stage0, so the old two-binding fixture can grow corpus coverage after integer constants landed.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised multiple integer local let bindings and final println.

description: Imported syn 0005 addition fixture with narrow constant integer + support

asi.hypothesis: A one-operator parser/checker slice for constant integer addition is enough to compile the old addition fixture while keeping lowering unchanged.
asi.feature_added: Parser and checker support for a single binary + over constant integers; result is rendered via existing constant println path.

description: Imported syn 0031 add two ints fixture using existing constant addition support

asi.hypothesis: The addition support added for syn 0005 should also handle the duplicate add-two-ints corpus case with no compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered constant addition with a different provenance fixture.

description: Imported syn 0032 subtraction fixture with narrow constant integer - support

asi.hypothesis: A single binary subtraction parser/checker path can cover the old subtraction fixture without broad arithmetic or codegen changes.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer subtraction expression; lowering remains constant println string output.

description: Imported syn 0033 multiplication fixture with narrow constant integer * support

asi.hypothesis: A direct parser/checker case for constant integer multiplication is enough for the selected fixture and keeps stage0 lowering unchanged.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer multiplication expression; result printed through existing constant path.

description: Imported syn 0034 division fixture with narrow constant integer / support

asi.hypothesis: A single constant integer division case can compile the old nonzero division fixture without adding runtime integer values.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer division expression; division by zero remains unsupported.
